title: Korak 23

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should use the add method of catalogue passing in series1.
You should create a variable named series2 and assign it an instance of TVSeries.
You should use the add method of catalogue passing in series2.

description:
Koristite metodu add od catalogue da dodate series1 u listu items.

Zatim, kreirajte još jednu varijablu series2. Dodelite joj još jedan instancu TVSeries i takođe dodajte series2 u katalog.
